HOME/CAREERS
Currently Seeking:

The Element is always looking for teachers who have an interest in our Montessori approach and are looking to teach in a dynamic and unique learning environment.

If you have a passion for your field of study, particularly the STEM subjects, The Humanities or French, and enjoy working with Adolescents, we encourage you to contact us.

Please reach out to the School Director, Sarah Wheeler, with your resumé and cover letter.
sarah@elementhighschool.com

Job Title: Guitar Teacher (Part-Time)

Part-Time, 2 hours per week

Job Description:

We are seeking a passionate and experienced Guitar Teacher to provide quality music instruction to students for 2 hours per week. This is an exciting opportunity for a skilled guitarist who enjoys working with adolescents of all levels, from beginners to more advanced players. The ideal candidate will foster a positive learning environment, encourage musical growth, and help students develop their guitar skills.

**Key Responsibilities:**

– Provide engaging and informative guitar lessons tailored to individual student needs.
– Develop lesson plans that cover fundamental techniques, music theory, and the enjoyment of playing the guitar.
– Teach a variety of musical genres (e.g., classical, rock, blues, jazz) based on student interests.
– Create a supportive and motivational atmosphere that encourages student progress and confidence.
